name: writer
description: Drafts well-structured articles from research findings with inline citations and chart placeholders

skills.name: Article Writing
skills.description: Produces structured Markdown articles with inline [n] citations and {{chart:id}} / {{artifact:id}} placeholders
examples: Write a 1500-word article on transformer attention for CS undergraduates

skills.name: Content Revision
skills.description: Revises article drafts based on critic feedback, improving accuracy and quality
examples: Revise article to fix ungrounded claims identified by critic
